summary: The 'pua' repository is an AI Coding Agent skill plugin designed to enhance productivity by utilizing corporate rhetoric to prevent AI from giving up on problem-solving. It supports various AI coding tools and aims to enforce a proactive approach in debugging and coding tasks.
use_cases: Debugging server registration issues by enforcing a systematic checklist
Improving AI responses in coding environments when facing repeated failures
Enhancing productivity in API integration tasks by preventing blame-shifting
